headline: Costco stock price shocks market despite major blowout quarter
summary: Costco (COST) just put up one of the cleanest quarters in retail, but the stock fell anyway. The retail giant set fresh records at the gas pump, leaned on a fast-growing online business, and kept members renewing at rates most retailers can only envy. Yet shares slid in the days after the report, ...
